nodes.name: Grey-cheeked tit-babbler
nodes.summary: Grey-cheeked tit-babbler（Mixornis flavicollis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Grey-cheeked tit-babbler。

nodes.name: Mixornis
nodes.summary: Mixornis（Mixornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如灰脸纹胸巨鹛、Kangean tit-babbler、纹胸巨鹛等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: Grey-cheeked tit-babbler
nodes.summary: The grey-cheeked tit-babbler (Mixornis flavicollis) is a species of bird in the family Timaliidae. It is endemic to Java. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References Collar, N. J. & Robson, C. 2007. Family Timaliidae (Babblers) pp. 70 – 291 in; del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A. & Christie, D.A. eds. Handbook of the Birds of the World, Vol. 12. Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions, Barcelona.
nodes.shortSummary: The grey-cheeked tit-babbler (Mixornis flavicollis) is a species of bird in the family Timaliidae. It is endemic to Java.
